title: elaeagnus × ebbingei
intro: Elaeagnus × ebbingei, also known as the Ebbinge's silverberry or the evergreen silverberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Elaeagnaceae family. It is known for its silvery-green foliage and fragrant, white flowers that attract pollinators. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory issues. Elaeagnus × ebbingei is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its health benefits, which include immune system support and antioxidant properties, and is valued for its potential to boost overall well-being.
